'''''Invincible''''' was a [[Tartan-class patrol cruiser|''Tartan''-class patrol cruiser]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Ship-stub}}
